title: Self-initiated heavy-segment prune
use_case: The model independently decides to prune a large completed orchestration segment after a heavy tool/subagent stretch, retaining only the facts needed for the new request.

entries.text:
I’m pruning the completed segment for the previous invert-density orchestration to keep context focused on the new `mask-floor` planning + execution flow. I’ll retain:  
- current request to add hard dark cutoff option,  
- newly created validated plan path,  
- and the requirement to orchestrate only after zero-issue validation.

input.to_pattern: Use planning_guidance.md to make a plan for that, then orchestrate only if the plan gets validated with no remainging issues
input.summary: Archived the completed Poisson invert-density story orchestration and subsequent banana generation/testing. Outcome: feature was implemented and approved, and user shifted focus to a new hard dark-value exclusion option requiring separate planning and orchestration.

entries.output:
Archived 27 messages from pattern "orchestrate .agents/plans/story-add-poisson-density-inversion-option.md" (resolved to msg_d023fcfb6001jdBXeQnYnG3wa9) to pattern "Use planning_guidance.md to make a plan for that, then orchestrate only if the plan gets validated with no remainging issues" (resolved to msg_d076288220016f0Vl2bbFGyp1a).
Summary: Archived the completed Poisson invert-density story orchestration and subsequent banana generation/testing. Outcome: feature was implemented and approved, and user shifted focus to a new hard dark-value exclusion option requiring separate planning and orchestration.
Index terms: poisson-invert-density, story-orchestration, dev-review-judge, banana-overlay, feature-complete, new-request-mask-floor

entries.output_excerpt:

Commits:
- `9d8e1859425dafe0b83b2e0fa1b4d68d6f767349` — `[Story PMF-1] Add Poisson mask floor hard exclusion`

Validation:

- `bun test` passed
- no blockers
